name: QMT MCP Server
what_it_does: MCP server for QMT (迅投QMT) — a popular Chinese quantitative trading platform used by hedge funds and quant traders. Enables AI agents to query market data, execute trading strategies, retrieve portfolio positions, and interact with QMT's algorithmic trading infrastructure.
use_cases: Querying real-time and historical market data from quant research agents
Monitoring portfolio positions and P&L from trading operations agents
Triggering and monitoring quantitative trading strategies from automation agents
Integrating QMT market data into AI-driven financial analysis workflows
not_for: Teams not using QMT platform (Chinese quant trading specific)
Retail investors without quantitative trading setup
Fully automated live trading without human oversight (high risk)
best_when: A quantitative trader or hedge fund using QMT wants AI agents to assist with strategy research, market data analysis, and portfolio monitoring in a supervised trading environment.
avoid_when: You use non-Chinese trading platforms. CRITICAL: Trading operations have irreversible financial consequences — never allow agents to execute live trades without human approval.

auth.notes: QMT platform credentials required. Standard QMT account login. Trading permissions controlled by broker/platform account settings.

pricing.paid_tiers: QMT platform fees plus brokerage account required
pricing.notes: QMT is a professional trading platform with associated costs. MCP server is free open source. Live trading requires funded brokerage account.

performance.rate_limits: Bounded by QMT platform quotas and market data subscriptions

known_agent_gotchas: FINANCIAL RISK: Trading operations have irreversible financial consequences — require human approval for any order execution
QMT is CN-only platform — requires Chinese brokerage account and Chinese market access
Quantitative trading requires careful backtesting before live deployment — agents should only assist, not execute autonomously
Community tool (nnquant) — not official QMT/xtquant integration
agent_readiness.security_notes: FINANCIAL SYSTEM: Trading platform with real money at stake. Never allow autonomous trade execution. CN data residency. Brokerage credentials are high-value targets — secure carefully.

security_score_components.security_notes: Real money trading system. Brokerage credentials are critical secrets. CN data residency. CSRC regulated. Never allow autonomous trading.
